_publications._publicationTitle: Medium throughput biochemical compound screening identifies novel agents for pharmacotherapy of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: preliminary screening results identifying 142 compounds that satisfied selection criteria (ratio between vital cells exposed compounds and negative control < 0.85
details: Used to assess effects of 472 small molecules on growth and survival, identifying 142 compounds that satisfied selection criteria with ratio between vital cells exposed to compounds and negative control < 0.85
